subtitles.original: ah 極彩色のdance floor

subtitles.english: we’re ignited

subtitles.original: and have no fear
subtitles.english: and have no fear

subtitles.english: ready to break through

subtitles.english: yes, that's why...!

subtitles.english: taking a stroll in the air step by step, in my own way

subtitles.original: 隙あらばその瞬間に完全掌握
subtitles.english: seizing the moment whenever there’s a chance

subtitles.english: i'm going to get stuck in the swamp!

subtitles.original: one two threeで深層心理crashして
subtitles.english: crash into deep psychological layers with one two three

subtitles.original: 今すぐね
subtitles.english: right now

subtitles.original: 私達の色に染め上げた世界を見せる！
subtitles.english: show the world we've dyed in our colors!

subtitles.original: 皆様！今年の応援もありがとうですわ！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you for your support this year!

subtitles.original: ホロライブIDはもっともっと盛り上がるよ！
subtitles.english: Hololive ID is going to get even more exciting!

subtitles.original: ずっと見ててね！来年もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Keep watching us! We look forward to your support next year too!

subtitles.original: よいお年を！
subtitles.english: Have a great new year!

subtitles.original: うほん、皆さん！森カリオペです！
subtitles.english: Ahem, everyone! This is Mori Calliope!

subtitles.original: What's up, Hololive English -Myth- coming right at you for a brand new year!
subtitles.english: What's up, Hololive English -Myth- coming right at you for a brand new year!

subtitles.original: 今年すごい盛り上がったね！
subtitles.english: This year was super exciting!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: We look forward to next year too!

subtitles.original: We're gonna rock the world ten times harder next year. You in? Next up, Ina!
subtitles.english: We're gonna rock the world ten times harder next year. You in? Next up, Ina!

subtitles.original: Ah, hello everyone! This is Ina!
subtitles.english: Ah, hello everyone! This is Ina!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!

subtitles.original: 今年、凄く楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: This year was really fun!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしくお願いしますね！
subtitles.english: We look forward to next year too!

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's go! Next is Kiara!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's go! Next is Kiara!

subtitles.original: キキリカ、小鳥遊キアラです！
subtitles.english: Kikiriki, this is Takanashi Kiara!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしく！盛り上げるぞー！
subtitles.english: Look forward to next year too! Let's pump it up!

subtitles.original: 行くぜ！イエス、カモン！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Yes, come on!

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's go!

subtitles.original: Let's have fun in 2026!
subtitles.english: Let's have fun in 2026!

subtitles.original: Let's go! やってやりましょうか！
subtitles.english: Let's go! Let's do this!

subtitles.original: 2026年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: Look forward to 2026 too!

subtitles.original: Alright, let's show them what we got!
subtitles.english: Alright, let's show them what we got!

subtitles.original: There's an answer out there somewhere / When the muses whisper 'truth or dare'
subtitles.english: There's an answer out there somewhere / When the muses whisper 'truth or dare'

subtitles.original: Hands are played, lights are low / But no one's keeping score
subtitles.english: Hands are played, lights are low / But no one's keeping score

subtitles.original: Set your goals and be tenacious / Cause the future is a game of chance
subtitles.english: Set your goals and be tenacious / Cause the future is a game of chance

subtitles.original: Chips are down, but I'm gonna win / I play until I win
subtitles.english: Chips are down, but I'm gonna win / I play until I win

subtitles.original: I'm not gonna give up now / The wheels of fortune circle back around
subtitles.english: I'm not gonna give up now / The wheels of fortune circle back around

subtitles.original: A future in the betting ring / A maze of outcomes drawing the golden string
subtitles.english: A future in the betting ring / A maze of outcomes drawing the golden string

subtitles.original: And through this tangled thread / I see what's up ahead
subtitles.english: And through this tangled thread / I see what's up ahead

subtitles.original: A wild chase
subtitles.english: A wild chase

subtitles.original: A steady pace
subtitles.english: A steady pace

subtitles.original: Got to try my luck, I'm spinning fate
subtitles.english: Got to try my luck, I'm spinning fate

subtitles.original: Spin the wheel, let's see where it falls / Testing the limits and betting it all
subtitles.english: Spin the wheel, let's see where it falls / Testing the limits and betting it all

subtitles.original: Round and round, jumping into the circle / Over and over, the dust will settle
subtitles.english: Round and round, jumping into the circle / Over and over, the dust will settle

subtitles.original: Though the game is never easy / And the outcome is a mystery
subtitles.english: Though the game is never easy / And the outcome is a mystery

subtitles.original: But these are fates we're betting on / Perfect, unbroken
subtitles.english: But these are fates we're betting on / Perfect, unbroken

subtitles.original: Caught alive / By wax and string
subtitles.english: Caught alive / By wax and string

subtitles.original: Tied us together / At the start of everything
subtitles.english: Tied us together / At the start of everything

subtitles.original: I'm not gonna give up yet / Spin back around with every chance I get
subtitles.english: I'm not gonna give up yet / Spin back around with every chance I get
